doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_sub1sp3 (mpfr/src/sub1sp.c L1056-L1380): same-precision same-sign subtraction fast path for 2*GMP_NUMB_BITS < p < 3*GMP_NUMB_BITS (i.e. 129 <= p <= 191 on x86_64), three-limb mantissas with sh = 192 - p. Same structural algorithm as sub1sp2 (compare magnitudes, exact difference, normalise, round, underflow check); the C code has four d-range branches with explicit 3-limb borrow propagation that collapse to a single bigint expression in TS.
c_signature: static int mpfr_sub1sp3(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, mpfr_srcptr c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode, mpfr_prec_t p)
divergence_from_c: Same divergences as sub1sp2: 3-limb subtraction collapsed to single-bigint extended-precision; static linkage dropped; Result return shape instead of mutate-int.
